name: Text Adventure
description:
**Updated as of 5/28/23 to be less random and more story driven! I recommend this over the last.

The bottom of character description now has '{{user}} is' for you to add your character details. The AI will remember your character description without fail if you use that.**

This thing can go in so many ways! Just give it a genre, tell it who you are, give yourself a goal if you want, and have fun! You can be as vague or precise as you want here.

When playing you should be able to ask questions about your status, what you see around you, what you're carrying, who the NPC's are, and most anything else without advancing the story.

Example: I'm a 3' tall cute goblin girl named Grelin. Put me in a fantasy adventure. I'm looking for a stolen family heirloom.
creator: Darren9743
